metadata.description: Skills and channel integrations for Nanotars

plugins.name: nanotars-brave-search
plugins.description: Add Brave Search API access to Nanotars agent containers. Enables web search for research, current events, and fact-checking. Guides through free API key setup. Triggers on "add brave search", "brave search", "web search setup", "add search".

plugins.name: nanotars-calendar
plugins.description: Add calendar access to Nanotars. Supports Google Calendar (gog CLI with OAuth) and CalDAV providers (iCloud, Nextcloud, Fastmail via cal CLI). Guides through authentication and configures environment variables. Triggers on "add calendar", "add caldav", "icloud calendar", "google calendar", "calendar setup".

plugins.name: nanotars-changedetection
plugins.description: Add changedetection.io integration to Nanotars. Enables agents to create and manage website watches for price monitoring, stock alerts, and content changes. Guides through API key setup and webhook configuration. Triggers on "add changedetection", "changedetection setup", "price monitoring", "website monitoring".

plugins.name: nanotars-claude-mem
plugins.description: Add persistent memory (claude-mem) to Nanotars agent containers. Creates systemd services for the worker daemon and Docker bridge, configures env vars. Run once after claude-mem plugin is installed.

plugins.name: nanotars-commute
plugins.description: Add travel time and commute lookup to Nanotars agents using Waze live traffic data. No API key needed. Triggers on "add commute", "commute setup", "travel time", "waze".

plugins.name: nanotars-cs2-esports
plugins.description: Add CS2 esports match tracking to Nanotars. Shows upcoming Counter-Strike 2 matches from Liquipedia. Triggers on "cs2 matches", "esports schedule", "counter-strike".

plugins.name: nanotars-dashboard
plugins.description: Add admin dashboard with system monitoring and task management. Triggers on "add dashboard", "dashboard setup", "admin dashboard", "dashboard skill".

plugins.name: nanotars-discord
plugins.description: Add Discord as a channel. Runs alongside WhatsApp or other channels.

plugins.name: nanotars-freshrss
plugins.description: Add FreshRSS feed reader integration to Nanotars. Connects agents to a self-hosted FreshRSS instance for news summaries, unread articles, feed management, and daily digests. Guides through API key setup and configures environment. Triggers on "add freshrss", "freshrss setup", "rss feeds", "add rss".

plugins.name: nanotars-giphy
plugins.description: Add GIF search and sending to Nanotars agents via Giphy API. Enables humorous GIF reactions in conversations. Guides through free API key setup. Triggers on "add giphy", "gif search", "add gifs", "giphy setup".

plugins.name: nanotars-github
plugins.description: Add GitHub API access to Nanotars. Enables agents to monitor repos, check PRs, issues, commits, and CI status. Guides through Personal Access Token setup. Triggers on "add github", "github setup", "github integration", "github token".

plugins.name: nanotars-gmail
plugins.description: Add Gmail access to Nanotars via gog CLI (Google Workspace CLI). Agents can search, read, and send emails. Shares OAuth credentials with Google Calendar if already configured. Triggers on "add gmail", "gmail setup", "gmail integration", "email setup".

plugins.name: nanotars-homeassistant
plugins.description: Add Home Assistant integration to Nanotars via official MCP Server. Enables agents to control smart home devices, query states, and manage automations. Guides through HA MCP Server setup and configures environment. Triggers on "add home assistant", "add homeassistant", "home assistant setup", "smart home".

plugins.name: nanotars-imap-read
plugins.description: Add read-only IMAP email access to Nanotars agent containers. Supports multiple providers (Gmail, Yahoo, Outlook, any IMAP server). Guides through app password setup and configures environment variables. Triggers on "add email", "add imap", "email integration", "read emails".

plugins.name: nanotars-n8n
plugins.description: Add n8n workflow automation integration to Nanotars. Enables agents to create monitoring workflows that trigger webhooks instead of burning tokens on frequent polling. Guides through MCP server setup and configures environment. Triggers on "add n8n", "n8n setup", "n8n integration", "workflow automation".

plugins.name: nanotars-norish
plugins.description: Add Norish recipe import to Nanotars agents. Send recipe URLs to your Norish instance for automatic import. Triggers on "add norish", "norish setup", "recipe import", "norish integration".

plugins.name: nanotars-notion
plugins.description: Add Notion API access to Nanotars. Enables agents to read and update Notion pages and databases for project management, notes, and tracking. Guides through integration setup. Triggers on "add notion", "notion setup", "notion integration", "notion api".

plugins.name: nanotars-parallel
plugins.description: Add Parallel AI web research to Nanotars via MCP Servers. Enables quick web search and deep research tasks with citations. Guides through API key setup. Triggers on "add parallel", "parallel ai", "parallel setup", "web research".

plugins.name: nanotars-slack
plugins.description: Add Slack as a messaging channel. Uses Socket Mode (no public URL needed). Triggers on "add slack", "slack setup", "slack channel".

plugins.name: nanotars-slack-formatting
plugins.description: Add Slack mrkdwn formatting guidance to Nanotars agents. Container skill that teaches agents to use Slack's mrkdwn syntax (*bold*, <url|text>, • bullets) instead of standard Markdown when responding in Slack channels. Triggers on "add slack formatting", "slack mrkdwn", "format for slack".

plugins.name: nanotars-stocks
plugins.description: Add stock price and financial data lookups via Yahoo Finance. Triggers on stock price questions, ticker lookups, market data requests.

plugins.name: nanotars-telegram-swarm
plugins.description: Add Agent Swarm (Teams) support to Telegram. Each subagent gets its own bot identity in the group. Requires Telegram channel to be set up first (use /add-channel-telegram). Triggers on "agent swarm", "agent teams telegram", "telegram swarm", "bot pool".

plugins.name: nanotars-telegram
plugins.description: Add Telegram as a channel. Can replace WhatsApp entirely or run alongside it. Also configurable as a control-only channel (triggers actions) or passive channel (receives notifications only).

plugins.name: nanotars-trains
plugins.description: Add UK train departure/arrival information to Nanotars via National Rail Darwin API. Guides through free API token registration and configures environment. Triggers on "add trains", "train times", "national rail", "uk trains setup".

plugins.name: nanotars-transcription
plugins.description: Add voice message transcription to Nanotars using OpenAI's Whisper API. Automatically transcribes voice notes so the agent can read and respond to them. Triggers on "add transcription", "voice transcription", "whisper", "transcribe voice".

plugins.name: nanotars-weather
plugins.description: Add weather lookup capability to Nanotars agents. Uses free wttr.in and Open-Meteo APIs — no API key needed. Triggers on "add weather", "weather setup", "weather skill".

plugins.name: nanotars-webhook
plugins.description: Add a webhook HTTP endpoint so external services (Home Assistant, uptime monitors, Proxmox) can push events that trigger agent turns. Avoids token-wasting cron polling. Triggers on "webhook", "add webhook", "http endpoint", "push events", "webhook endpoint".

plugins.name: nanotars-whatsapp
plugins.description: Add WhatsApp as a channel. Install the WhatsApp channel plugin and authenticate.
